title: Robertsganj Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Robertsganj, with a Z-Score of +3.46. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Robertsganj are extremely hot, with a heat index exacerbated by high temperatures. 
 The relative humidity is at 57%, and the wind speed is 9.4 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.1 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
